question.text: Under REIT Regulations, within how many days from the end of the half-year ending September 30 must the half-yearly valuation report be prepared?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under REIT Regulations, a half yearly valuation of the REIT assets shall be conducted for the half-year ending on September 30 for incorporating any key changes in the previous six months and such half yearly valuation report shall be prepared within 45 days from the end of such half year. **The Trap:** 30 days is the quarterly report timeline, not the half-yearly valuation timeline. 15 days is the valuation report filing deadline. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** REIT half-yearly valuation = within 45 days of September 30. This is different from InvIT where publicly listed units require valuation within 1 month of each half-year end.
